problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monte. Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
